page.title: Template:People by nationality and century category header

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:People by nationality and century category header]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 496 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#if:{{in string|source={{PAGENAME}}|target=people|plain=true|nomatch=}}|{{People by nationality and century category header/core|nondiffdenom_noun=people|Title_century ={{{Title_century|{{Title century}}}}}|Overide_Occupation={{{OverideOccupation|people}}}|Title_continental={{{Title_continental|{{Country2continental|{{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|Title_demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}|Title_country={{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}|ParentOccupation={{{ParentOccupation}}}|SiblingOccupation={{{SiblingOccupation}}}|Diffusing occupation={{{Diffusing occupation|people}}}|JobPortal={{{JobPortal|Society}}}|nondiff={{{nondiff|include}}}}}|[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
